channel.title: Makerspaces on Soyoung Choi: a Nursing Scientist for Palliative Care
channel.description: Recent content in Makerspaces on Soyoung Choi: a Nursing Scientist for Palliative Care

item.title: Inclusive Makerspaces
item.description: Inclusive makerspaces is the primary project that JooYoung is currently focusing on.
